span.p:
skip
not failed, or budget exhausted
and cooloff not elapsed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
reprime
summary=failed AND
attempts < 3 OR 24h elapsed

incrementSummaryAutoHealAttempt
flips summaryStatus=pending
bumps attempts + lastAttemptAt

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GenerateSummaryCommand
dispatched via effect dispatcher
direct SQS send

span.p:
Budget: 3 attempts
then 24h cool-off before
next attempt allowed
